response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and craftsmanship credentials but lacks the core requirement of 8 years of C++ experience. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project. No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform leadership, distributed systems at the required scale in C++, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not map to this C++-centric infrastructure role.
strengths: Long track record of senior/staff-level engineering across diverse domains
Experience with distributed, high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic millions of req/s)
Demonstrated mentoring via workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief NI stint qualifies
No production cloud compute platform architecture experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Missing cloud compute platform architecture background
